allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, nvm, npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:ProgramData\\nvm", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; Write-Output "---env PATH---"; $env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match "node|nvm|npm" })
PowerShell(gh api repos/josStorer/chatGPTBox --jq '{name, stars: .stargazers_count, pushed: .pushed_at, archived, description}')
PowerShell(gh api repos/yetone/openai-translator --jq '{name, stars: .stargazers_count, pushed: .pushed_at, archived, description}')
PowerShell(gh api repos/immersive-translate/immersive-translate --jq '{name, stars: .stargazers_count, pushed: .pushed_at, archived, description}')

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -m pip install --pre googletrans tqdm "httpx>=0.27.2,<1.0" --quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)
